title: Best serum ever
body: My skin has never looked brighter. Worth every penny!

title: Great sound but short battery
body: Battery lasts about 4 hours, not the "6 hours" advertised. Sound quality is excellent though.

title: Too heavy for summer
body: It leaves a greasy feeling that takes forever to absorb. Better for winter use.

title: Noticeable results in 3 weeks
body: My fine lines are visibly reduced. I use it 15 minutes daily.

title: Slow but working
body: I see baby hairs after 2 months of daily use. Patience is key, but it does work.
